dj_text: ROCKET FUEL! L.O.C. - Momentet (feat. U$O) (Officiel HD Musik Video) done, 100% Jesus LAUNCHED! And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
hijack_text: {combo_hit}, listeners, this is Side Joker from Beyond Bingo
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: 100% Jesus
